title: Feature Importance Path
description: Build fluency in Feature Importance inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Sensitivity
steps.summary: Sensitivity belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Importance. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Importance. Compare it with Sensitivity and Specificity and Specificity. It opens into Sensitivity and Specificity and Feature Sensitivity Analysis.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Sensitivity and Specificity

steps.title: Specificity
steps.summary: Specificity belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Importance. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Importance. Compare it with Sensitivity and Specificity and Sensitivity. It opens into Sensitivity and Specificity.
